content:
# Session 18 (iter-018) — Review Summary

## Metadata
- 2 prover lanes (opus): FBC `Cohomology/FlatBaseChange.lean` (prove the 2 b2 mate legs) + SNAP `Picard/SectionGradedRing.lean` (apply analogist-validated object-pinned native lemma).
- **Real-code sorries (verified firsthand): FBC 5→3 (closed 2), SNAP 6→7 (decomposition, 0 closed).**
- FBC raw sorry lines now: L1760(glue), L1858, L2105, L2286, L2308 (2 of the residual = COMPILE-DEAD seeds, not touched per directive).
- SNAP raw sorry lines: L2122(native final step), L2278(hK_lhs), + 5 cascade coherences (L2945/2967/2982/2985/3045).
- blueprint-doctor: **0 findings** (all chapters `\input`'d, all `\ref`/`\uses` resolve, no new axioms). sync_leanok iter-18 sha bf4dfe6, +3/−0.

## HEADLINE — FBC: both b2 mate legs CLOSED (axiom-clean, verified firsthand)
Both legs verified by me via `lean_verify`: axioms `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}` only — **no `sorryAx`**.

### `chartBaseChangeGeometricComparison_mate` (geometric leg) — SOLVED
- Route (analogist `fbc-geom-mate`): drive entirely by CLOSED coherence lemmas, NEVER `unit_conjugateEquiv` over the composite (that is the 200k-hb bomb).
- `apply Iso.ext; rw [conjugateIsoEquiv_apply_hom]`, then KEY unfold `simp only [chartBaseChangeGeometricComparisonNat, chartBaseChangePushforwardNat, eq_mpr_eq_cast, cast_eq, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom]` — **`eq_mpr_eq_cast, cast_eq` dissolve the `letI : Algebra …`-induced `Eq.mpr` casts** that iter-017 flagged as the blocker.
- `set` ring maps + adjunctions; split right-assoc 3-factor conjugate with `← conjugateEquiv_comp` (×2, explicit midpoints); factor1 = `Scheme.Modules.conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv` (**REAL Mathlib**, Sheaf.lean:238, @[simp] — the iter-017 "comment-fiction" note was FALSE), factor2 = new helper `conjugateEquiv_pullbackCongr`, factor3 = `f3` iso-calc + `pushforwardCongr_inv_eq`.

### `chartBaseChangeModuleReassoc_extendScalarsComp` (algebraic leg) — SOLVED
- Mirror template. `simp only [chartBaseChangeModuleReassocNat, chartBaseChangeRestrictReassocNat, eq_mpr_eq_cast, cast_eq, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom, eqToIso.hom]` (the `eqToIso.hom` turns `(eqToIso _).hom → eqToHom _`).
- **REQUIRED: re-declare the three `letI : Algebra …` instances at the proof head** — without them `includeLeftRingHom`'s `(R:=)(A:=)(B:=)` cannot synthesize and every `set` silently breaks to `CommRingCat.ofHom sorry` (subtle trap).
- Split `← conjugateEquiv_comp` (×2); factor1 = `conjugateEquiv_extendScalarsComp` (iter-017), factor2 = new helper `conjugateEquiv_extendScalars_eqToHom hRing` (`h` supplied explicitly — bare `rw` cannot infer the Prop hyp), factor3 = `f3` calc.

3 new reusable helpers created (`conjugateEquiv_pullbackCongr`, `pushforwardCongr_inv_eq`, `conjugateEquiv_extendScalars_eqToHom`) — all axiom-clean (lvbc-fbc018 verified).

### Glue `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_mate_glue` (L1760) — still typed-sorry
Optional stretch (conditional in PROGRESS). Both dependency legs now live → purely an assembly step for next iter. Blocker: iterated-mate transposition via `iterated_mateEquiv_conjugateEquiv` is `TwoSquare`-valued; naive use forces composite-adjunction unit to whnf → 200k-hb bomb.

## SNAP — 7-iter `rw [Category.assoc]` wall BROKEN, but 0 net elimination (new isDefEq wall one step later)
`tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_native` (L2058) added. Statement pins every comparison-μ object-arg in **unfolded image form** (`sheafification.obj (tensorObj (C := MonoidalPresheaf X) A♭ B♭)`), never folded `A.tensorObj B`.
- **Decisive confirmation:** with the leading μ pinned at STATEMENT level, `rw [Category.assoc, associator_naturality]` fires **bomb-free** — the exact step that isDefEq-bombed for 7 iters on the folded goal. Cross-checked: `simp only [tensorObj]; rw [...]` on the FOLDED goal still BOMBS → pinning MUST be in the statement, in-proof unfolding does not help.
- Full chain runs bomb-free (cold-build GREEN, 2441 jobs): `rw [Category.assoc, associator_naturality]` → `erw [associator_hom_app]` → `simp only [sheafification, toMonoidalCategory, tensorHom_id, id_tensorHom, Category.assoc]` → `erw [← whiskerRight_comp_assoc]` → `conv_lhs => enter [2,1]; rw [Category.assoc]; erw [Iso.inv_hom_id]` + `erw [Category.comp_id]`. Reduces to head 3-factor prefix = `tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_head` verbatim + `assocCommonForm` tail.
- **Residual (1 sorry, L2122):** applying the proven head lemma to the reduced goal hits the localized-comp isDefEq timeout (200000 hb) on **every** full-goal op (`exact`/`rw`/`erw`/`simp`/`conv`/`refine (h2 _).trans`), because the goal still carries the full `tail` → unifying the head-lemma composite re-checks the `LocalizedMonoidal`↔`modulesLocalizedMonoidal` comp-instance over heavy `Localization.Monoidal.μ` (→ `Localization.fac` whnf). Documented exhaustive attempt list inline + in task_result.
- `hK_lhs` (L2278) unchanged; `simp only [tensorObj]; exact tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_native` ALSO bombs (same wall) — so hK_lhs cannot yet consume native by `exact`. Same suffix-peel route needed.
- **Concrete unblock (next iter):** suffix-peel the common `tail` (bomb-free over the localized comp — `cancel_mono` if `tail` split-mono: its first factor `L'(α^p)` + the μ's are isos; OR a `conv`-isolated `← Category.assoc` chain that never re-typechecks the whole composite) to shrink to `head = s1.inv`, THEN `exact tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_head A B C`.

## Subagent findings (reports in `logs/iter-018/`)
- **lvbc-fbc018** — PASS, 0 red flags. Both legs faithful in statement AND proof route + axiom-clean; 3 helpers honest; chapter prose adequate; the only "fiction" mention is the `% NOTE` (L2197-2203) that *corrects* it. Minor: 2 helpers lack `\lean{}` blocks (coverage debt → recs).
- **lvbc-snap018** — 1 major (blueprint-side): native proof block lacked a `% NOTE:` caveat for its residual sorry (L2122) → **FIXED** (I added the caveat; chapter convention is statement-`\leanok`-only so a `% NOTE` is the honest open-proof signal). native statement faithful; hK_lhs caveat intact, not over-claimed.
- **lean-auditor018** — 31 issues (19 must-fix/6 major/6 minor). The 19 "must-fix" = the 12 tracked frontier sorries (5 FBC + 7 SNAP, project work NOT iter-018 defects) + 6 excuse-comments (honest sorry-backing disclosure) + glue still sorry → **DOWNGRADED per iter-014..017 precedent.** Auditor confirmed the 2 new FBC proofs axiom-clean. Genuine actionable = accumulated dead scaffolding (FBC L1957-1960 orphan `maxHeartbeats` scoping to a section comment; FBC L2000-2104 104-line SCAFFOLD block; SNAP L2148-2278 ~130-line multi-iter dead-end scaffold) → MEDIUM, bundle into a cleanup/mate-excision lane (recs).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, proof of `lem:tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_native`: added `% NOTE:` flagging the residual `sorry` (L2122) + the concrete suffix-peel unblock (lvbc-snap018 major; chapter uses statement-`\leanok`-only so the marker absence does not distinguish open from closed).
- No `\leanok` overrides: convention check confirmed this chapter/FBC chapter use **statement-only `\leanok`** (the known-closed `gammaPushforwardIso_comp` has no proof-block `\leanok` either). Both closed legs carry statement `\leanok` (L2167, L2331) and verify sorryAx-free → correctly marked, no override needed.
- No `\lean{...}` corrections: provers renamed nothing; both legs + native match their `\lean{}` blocks.

## Coverage debt (see recommendations.md)
3 new FBC helpers are `lean_aux`/unmatched (no blueprint entry): `AlgebraicGeometry.conjugateEquiv_pullbackCongr`, `pushforwardCongr_inv_eq`, `conjugateEquiv_extendScalars_eqToHom`. `tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_native` is already blueprinted (planner anticipated it). 83 total unmatched (≈26 = the long-deferred `RelativeTensorCoequalizer.*`/`W_*` SNAP helpers, deferred since iter-008 to the file-split refactor).
